dataset.description: Configurable parameters to construct the dataset for a Mask2former experiment.

test_max_size.description: The maximum resize size for test
test_max_size.title: Test max size

test_min_size.description: The minimum resize size for test data
test_min_size.title: Test min size

train_crop_size.description: The random crop size for training data in [H, W]
train_crop_size.title: Train crop size

train_max_size.description: The maximum random crop size for training data
train_max_size.title: Train max size

train_min_size.description: A list of sizes to perform random resize.
train_min_size.title: Train min size

contiguous_id.description: Flag to enable contiguous ids for labels.
contiguous_id.title: contiguous id

label_map.description: A path to label map file
label_map.title: label map

pin_memory.description:
Flag to enable the dataloader to allocate pagelocked memory for faster
                    of data between the CPU and GPU.
pin_memory.title: pin_memory

pixel_mean.description: The input mean for RGB frames
pixel_mean.title: input mean per pixel

pixel_std.description: The input standard deviation per pixel for RGB frames
pixel_std.title: input std per pixel

quant_calibration_dataset.description: Configurable parameters for the quantization calibration dataset.

images_dir.description: Path to images directory for quantization calibration
images_dir.title: images directory

test.description: Configurable parameters to construct the test dataset.

annot_file.description: JSON file in JSONL format for image/mask pair
annot_file.title: Annotatioin file for semantic data

img_dir.description: Image directory (can be relative path to root_dir)
img_dir.title: Raw image directory

panoptic_dir.description: Directory of panoptic segmentation annotation images
panoptic_dir.title: Panoptic image directory

panoptic_json.description: JSON file in COCO panoptic format
panoptic_json.title: COCO Panoptic JSON

train.description: Configurable parameters to construct the train dataset.

annot_file.description: JSON file in JSONL format for image/mask pair
annot_file.title: Annotatioin file for semantic data

img_dir.description: Image directory (can be relative path to root_dir)
img_dir.title: Raw image directory

panoptic_dir.description: Directory of panoptic segmentation annotation images
panoptic_dir.title: Panoptic image directory

panoptic_json.description: JSON file in COCO panoptic format
panoptic_json.title: COCO Panoptic JSON

val.description: Configurable parameters to construct the validation dataset.

annot_file.description: JSON file in JSONL format for image/mask pair
annot_file.title: Annotatioin file for semantic data

img_dir.description: Image directory (can be relative path to root_dir)
img_dir.title: Raw image directory

panoptic_dir.description: Directory of panoptic segmentation annotation images
panoptic_dir.title: Panoptic image directory

panoptic_json.description: JSON file in COCO panoptic format
panoptic_json.title: COCO Panoptic JSON

gen_trt_engine.description: Configurable parameters to construct the TensorRT engine builder for a Mask2former experiment.

batch_size.description:
The batch size of the input Tensor for the engine.
                    A value of :code:`-1` implies dynamic tensor shapes.
batch_size.title: Batch size

gpu_id.description: The index of the GPU to build the TensorRT engine.
gpu_id.title: GPU ID

onnx_file.description: Path to the ONNX model file.
onnx_file.title: ONNX file

results_dir.description: Path to where all the assets generated from a task are stored.
results_dir.title: Results directory

tensorrt.description: Hyper parameters to configure the TensorRT Engine builder.

data_type.description: The precision to be set for building the TensorRT engine.
data_type.title: data type

layers_precision.description: The list to specify layer precision.
layers_precision.title: layers_precision

max_batch_size.description:
The maximum batch size in the optimization profile for
                    the input tensor of the TensorRT engine.
max_batch_size.title: Maximum batch size

min_batch_size.description:
The minimum batch size in the optimization profile for
                    the input tensor of the TensorRT engine.
min_batch_size.title: Min batch size

opt_batch_size.description:
The optimum batch size in the optimization profile for
                    the input tensor of the TensorRT engine.
opt_batch_size.title: Optimum batch size

workspace_size.description:
The size (in MB) of the workspace TensorRT has
                    to run it's optimization tactics and generate the
                    TensorRT engine.
workspace_size.title: Max workspace size

tensorrt.title: TensorRT hyper params.

timing_cache.description:
Path to a TensorRT timing cache that speeds up engine generation.
                    This will be created/read/updated.
timing_cache.title: TensorRT timing cache

trt_engine.description:
Path to the TensorRT engine generated should be stored.
                    This only works with :code:`tao-deploy`.
trt_engine.title: TensorRT engine

verbose.description: Flag to enable verbose TensorRT logging.
verbose.title: Verbose

model.description: Configurable parameters to construct the model for a Mask2former experiment.

out_features.description: List of output feature names for swin backbone.
out_features.title: output features

pretrain_img_size.description: Input image size for training the pretrained model.
pretrain_img_size.title: pretrained imaeg size

use_checkpoint.description: Whether to use checkpointing to save memory.
use_checkpoint.title: use checkpointing

pretrained_weights.description: [Optional] Path to a pretrained backbone file.
pretrained_weights.title: pretrained backbone path

ape.description: If True, add absolute position embedding to the patch embedding.
ape.title: absolute position embedding

depths.description: Depths of each Swin Transformer stage.
depths.title: swin transformer depth

mlp_ratio.description: Ratio of mlp hidden dim to embedding dim.
mlp_ratio.title: mlp ratio

num_heads.description: Number of attention head of each stage.
num_heads.title: number of heads

out_features.description: List of output feature names for swin backbone.
out_features.title: output features

patch_norm.description: If True, add normalization after patch embedding.
patch_norm.title: patch normalization

pretrain_img_size.description: Input image size for training the pretrained model.
pretrain_img_size.title: pretrained image size

qk_scale.description: Override default qk scale of head_dim ** -0.5 if set.
qk_scale.title: qk scale

qkv_bias.description: If True, add a learnable bias to query, key, value.
qkv_bias.title: qkv bias

use_checkpoint.description: Whether to use checkpointing to save memory.
use_checkpoint.title: use checkpointing

export.description: A flag to enable export mode.
export.title: export

class_weight.description: The relative weight of the classification error in the matching cost.
class_weight.title: Class loss coefficient

dec_layers.description: Numer of decoder layers in the transformer
dec_layers.title: decoder layers

dice_weight.description: The relative weight of the focal loss of the binary mask in the matching cost.
dice_weight.title: focal loss coefficient

importance_sample_ratio.description: Ratio of points that are sampled via importnace sampling.
importance_sample_ratio.title: importance sampling ratio

mask_weight.description: The relative weight of the dice loss of the binary mask in the matching cost
mask_weight.title: mask loss coefficient

no_object_weight.description: The relative classification weight applied to the no-object category.
no_object_weight.title: no object coefficient

pre_norm.description: Flag to add layer norm in the encoder or not.
pre_norm.title: Pre norm

train_num_points.description: The number of points P to sample.
train_num_points.title: number of points

object_mask_threshold.description:
The value of the threshold to be used when
                    filtering out the object mask.
object_mask_threshold.title: object mask threshold

overlap_threshold.description:
The value of the threshold to be used when
                    evaluating overlap.
overlap_threshold.title: overlap threshold

deformable_transformer_encoder_in_featur.description: List of feature names for deformable transformer encoder input.
deformable_transformer_encoder_in_featur.title: transformer encoder in_features

test_topk_per_image.description: keep topk instances per image for instance segmentation.
test_topk_per_image.title: top k per image

model_name.description: Name of model if invoking task via :code:`model_agnostic`
model_name.title: Model name

quantize.description: Configurable parameters to run model quantization for a Mask2Former experiment.

algorithm.description: Calibration/optimization algorithm. Used by ModelOpt backends (modelopt.pytorch and modelopt.onnx). Ignored by torchao backend.
algorithm.title: Calibration algorithm

backend_kwargs.description: Additional keyword arguments to pass to the backend
backend_kwargs.title: Backend kwargs

device.description: Device to use for calibration. Accepts 'cuda' (uses default GPU), 'cpu', 'trt' (TensorRT for ONNX backend), or specific GPU device like 'cuda:0', 'cuda:1', etc. If 'cuda' is specified but no GPU is available, the framework will automatically fall back to 'cpu'. Note: 'trt' is only supported by the modelopt.onnx backend for ONNX Runtime with TensorRT execution provider.
device.title: Calibration device

layers.description: List of per-module quantization configurations. Each entry specifies which modules to quantize and their data types. This is the primary way to configure quantization.
layers.title: Layer quantization configs

model_path.description: Path to the model to be quantized. For ONNX backend, path to ONNX file.
model_path.title: Model path

results_dir.description: Path to where all the assets generated from a task are stored.
results_dir.title: Results directory

skip_names.description: List of module/layer names or patterns to exclude from quantization
skip_names.title: Skip names

results_dir.description: Path to where all the assets generated from a task are stored.
results_dir.title: Results directory

train.description: Configurable parameters to construct the trainer for a Mask2former experiment.

activation_checkpoint.description:
A True value instructs train to recompute in backward pass to save GPU memory,
        rather than storing activations. Note: activation checkpointing is incompatible
        with find_unused_parameters in DDP and may cause errors if the model has unused
        parameters.
activation_checkpoint.title: enable activation checkpointing

checkpoint_interval.description: The interval (in epochs) at which a checkpoint will be saved. Helps resume training.
checkpoint_interval.title: Checkpoint interval

checkpoint_interval_unit.description: The unit of the checkpoint interval.
checkpoint_interval_unit.title: Checkpoint interval unit

clip_grad_norm.description:
Amount to clip the gradient by L2 Norm.
        A value of 0.0 specifies no clipping.
clip_grad_norm.title: clip gradient norm

distributed_strategy.description:
The multi-GPU training strategy.
        DDP (Distributed Data Parallel) and Fully Sharded DDP are supported.
distributed_strategy.title: distributed_strategy

freeze.description:
List of layer names to freeze.
        Example: ["backbone", "transformer.encoder", "input_proj"].
freeze.title: freeze

gpu_ids.description:
List of GPU IDs to run the training on. The length of this list
        must be equal to the number of gpus in train.num_gpus.
gpu_ids.title: GPU IDs

is_dry_run.description:
Whether to run the trainer in Dry Run mode. This serves
        as a good means to validate the spec file and run a sanity check on the trainer
        without actually initializing and running the trainer.
is_dry_run.title: Is dry run

num_epochs.description: Number of epochs to run the training.
num_epochs.title: Number of epochs

num_gpus.description: The number of GPUs to run the train job.
num_gpus.title: Number of GPUs

num_nodes.description: Number of nodes to run the training on. If > 1, then multi-node is enabled.
num_nodes.title: Number of nodes

optim.description: Hyper parameters to configure the optimizer.

backbone_multiplier.description: A multiplier for backbone learning rate.
backbone_multiplier.title: backbone learning rate multiplier

gamma.description: Multiplicative factor of learning rate decay.
gamma.title: gamma

lr.description: The initial learning rate for training the model.
lr.title: learning rate

lr_scheduler.description:
The learning scheduler:
                    * MultiStep : Decrease the lr by lr_decay from lr_steps
                    * Warmuppoly : Poly learning rate schedule.
lr_scheduler.title: learning rate scheduler

momentum.description: The momentum for the AdamW optimizer.
momentum.title: momentum - AdamW

monitor_name.description: The metric value to be monitored for the :code:`AutoReduce` Scheduler.
monitor_name.title: monitor_name

type.description: Type of optimizer used to train the network.

optim.title: optimizer

precision.description: Precision to run the training on.
precision.title: precision

pretrained_model_path.description: Path to a pre-trained Mask2Former model to initialize the current training from.

results_dir.description: Path to where all the assets generated from a task are stored.
results_dir.title: Results directory

resume_training_checkpoint_path.description: Path to the checkpoint to resume training from.
resume_training_checkpoint_path.title: Resume checkpoint path

seed.description: The seed for the initializer in PyTorch. If < 0, disable fixed seed.
seed.title: Seed for randomization

use_distributed_sampler.description: Use distributed sampler for multi-GPU training.
use_distributed_sampler.title: use distributed sampler

validation_interval.description:
The interval (in epochs) at which a evaluation
        will be triggered on the validation dataset.
validation_interval.title: Validation interval
